source_jobs.title: Head of Media Buying / Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
HEAD OF MEDIA BUYING / OPERATIONS MANAGER




CONTRACT OPTIONS

 - United States → official employment (W-2)

 - Europe → B2B contract


WORK SCHEDULE

 - Flexible hours, with core communication between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST

 - Must be prepared to respond to critical issues outside of these hours when necessary

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking a Head of Media Buying / Operations Manager to oversee infrastructure, processes, and team coordination in a fast-growing performance marketing company. This is a pivotal role that combines hands-on expertise in media buying (Meta Ads, CPA model) with operational leadership.

You will be responsible for daily operations, launching new offers, managing accounts and tracking systems, and ensuring smooth communication across the team.

 


CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - 5+ years of experience in performance marketing / media buying

 - Hands-on expertise with Meta Ads Manager / Business Manager (accounts, proxies, IPs, pixels, anti-detect tools)

 - Proven track record managing large budgets ($1M+/month)

 - Strong knowledge of CPA/RevShare models and affiliate marketing

 - Excellent organizational and communication skills (Slack, ClickUp)

 - Team management experience is a strong plus

 - Tools: Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, RedTrack, Voluum, Everflow, Dolphin{anty}, ClickUp

 


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Manage Meta Ads accounts, profiles, access, and domains

 - Ensure account stability and minimize risks of bans

 - Configure tracking systems (RedTrack, Everflow)

 - Review creatives for compliance and quality

 - Coordinate launches with media buyers and support teams

 - Operate in Slack: assign tasks, monitor execution, and maintain workflows

 - Conduct weekly team meetings and one-on-one performance reviews

 - Hire, onboard, and manage team members (support, media buyers, creatives)

 - Leverage AI tools to optimize processes and improve efficiency

 


WHY JOIN

 - 🔑 Key role in scaling business operations

 - 🌍 International team with a flexible and collaborative culture

 - 💡 Unique opportunity to combine media buying expertise with operational management

 

📌 If you are an experienced Head of Media Buying with a strong background in Meta Ads and ready to take on operational leadership, we encourage you to apply!

source_jobs.title: Growth & Launch Operator (Fintech / Crypto Payments)
source_jobs.description:

Зараз шукаємо ключову людину, яка допоможе побудувати growth-напрямок з нуля та запустити продукт на ринку Іспанії.

Це не класична “marketing manager” роль.

Нам потрібен autonomous operator? людина, яка:

 - вміє запускати нові продукти та ринки;

 - не боїться хаосу early-stage;

 - може самостійно організувати execution;

 - розуміє, як будувати acquisition через community, referrals, influencers та partnerships;

 - готова брати ownership за результат.


ЩО ПОТРІБНО БУДЕ РОБИТИ

 - Будувати influencer / referral / community acquisition

 - Працювати з локальними community, Telegram-екосистемами, creators та micro-influencers

   - copywriting
   
   - SMM
   
   - SEO
   
   - creatives
   
   - контент
   
   - локальні партнерства

 - Самостійно знаходити та координувати підрядників

 - Допомагати з positioning та packaging продукту

 - Будувати системний launch process разом із founder’ом


ЩО ДЛЯ НАС ВАЖЛИВО

 - Досвід у fintech / payments / crypto / web3 / neobank / wallet продуктах

 - Досвід запуску growth або GTM у startup/scale-up середовищі

 - Hands-on mindset — готовність багато робити самостійно

БУДЕ ПЛЮСОМ

ЩО ПРОПОНУЄМО

ФОРМАТ

source_jobs.title: FPGA  Developer
source_jobs.description:
Ми шукаємо досвідченого FPGA-розробника для роботи над створенням передових апаратних рішень. Ідеальний кандидат має глибокі знання принципів проектування FPGA, володіє VHDL/Verilog та методологіями цифрового проектування. Ви будете відповідальні за повний цикл розробки FPGA – від аналізу вимог до синтезу, впровадження та тестування.

Обов’язки:

 - Аналіз системних вимог і перетворення їх у детальні специфікації для проектування FPGA.

 - Проектування, розробка та верифікація складних цифрових схем за допомогою VHDL/Verilog.

 - Виконання синтезу FPGA, розміщення та трасування, аналізу часу та оптимізації енергоспоживання.

 - Співпраця з міждисциплінарними командами для інтеграції FPGA-дизайнів.

 - Розробка тестових стендів і проведення ретельної верифікації та валідації FPGA-проектів.

 - Діагностика та усунення апаратних несправностей.

 - Підтримка актуальності знань щодо новітніх FPGA-технологій та галузевих тенденцій.

Вимоги:

 - Ступінь бакалавра або магістра з електроніки, комп’ютерної інженерії або суміжної спеціальності.

 - Висока компетенція у VHDL/Verilog та інструментах FPGA-розробки (Xilinx Vivado, Intel Quartus).

 - Ґрунтовні знання принципів цифрового проектування, аналізу часу та методів синтезу.

 - Досвід прототипування FPGA та використання засобів для діагностики.

 - Бажаним є досвід роботи з високошвидкісними інтерфейсами (PCIe, Ethernet, DDR).

Що ми пропонуємо:

 - Конкурентну заробітну плату та соціальний пакет.

 - Можливості для професійного розвитку та зростання.

 - Співпрацю у команді професіоналів та інноваційне робоче середовище.

 - Участь у розробці передових проєктів.

 - Основний формат роботи – віддалено, але передбачаються періодичні відрядження до офісу.

 - Пропонується можливість броні.

Якщо ви захоплюєтесь проектуванням FPGA та готові долучитися до нашої команди, надсилайте своє резюме.

source_jobs.title: VP Sales (LatAm)
source_jobs.description:
Industry: Offshore iGaming (mandatory) | Forex (strong plus)
Region: Latin America
Core Markets: Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Peru, Chile, Argentina


About the Client

Our client processes tens of millions in monthly volumes across cards, APMs, and crypto - operating in some of the most complex and regulated verticals: iGaming, Forex, and Crypto.

Founded in Europe, they scaled rapidly and became a market leader not only across Europe but also in Africa.

LATAM is their next strategic growth pillar - and they are building leadership there with full commitment, not testing the waters.

They are more than a PSP.

Their platform combines smart payment routing, proprietary anti-fraud systems, and advanced cascading logic, purpose-built for high-risk merchants operating across Europe, LATAM, and Africa.

To execute this ambition, they're looking for a true sales leader to own growth in the region.


The Role

As VP Sales LatAm, you will fully own revenue growth and market expansion across Latin America.
This is not a pipeline-management role - this is about owning strategy, deals, and results.

You will work directly with founders and have real influence over product, risk, and operational decisions.


Key Objectives (First 6–12 Months)

 - Launch active processing with 2 of the top 5 iGaming merchants in key LATAM markets
   (local, European, and Asian operators).

 - Enter the Forex vertical by onboarding 5 clients from the regional top-15.

 - Reach $20M in monthly processing volume.


What they’re looking for:

 - 6+ years of experience in iGaming, Forex, or high-risk fintech.

 - Proven track record selling to or managing LATAM-based merchants.

 - Deep understanding of the offshore ecosystem: payments, risk, chargebacks, licensing constraints.

 - Established personal network and reputation among operators and merchants.

 - Strategic, structured thinker with strong communication skills and executive presence.


What’s Offered:

Impact & Ownership:

 - Full visibility into P&L with the ability to influence product, risk, and operations.

 - Direct access to founders - weekly syncs, zero bureaucracy, decisions made in hours.

 - Real autonomy to test new providers, flows, or regions - build the case, get fast approval, execute.

Financial Upside & Growth:

 - Competitive base salary + performance-based bonuses tied to real KPIs (volume, margin, quality).

 - Equity available for proven performance - we’re looking for owners, not employees.

 - Budget to build your team + learning and development budget.

 - Opportunity to lead Business Development across adjacent areas: cross-border payments, low-risk payments, crypto, and beyond.

source_jobs.title: Antenna Engineer (RF / EM Simulation)
source_jobs.description:
📍 Локація: Украина/Київ (гібридний формат)
🕓 Зайнятість: full-time



Про компанію

Наш клієнт - українська продуктова R&D-компанія, що розробляє UAV (безпілотні системи) та IoT-рішення. Команда створює власні апаратно-програмні продукти - від ідеї до прототипу та виробництва.

Зараз компанія знаходиться на етапі розвитку RF-напрямку та шукає спеціаліста, який допоможе перейти від теорії до практичної реалізації антен.



Про роль

Ви станете першим внутрішнім антенним спеціалістом у команді. Зовнішня експертиза є, прототипи є - бракує людини, яка зробить це руками всередині. Ви відповідатиме за розробку, симуляцію, тестування та інтеграцію антен у реальні пристрої.

Це роль для інженера, який хоче працювати не лише з теорією, а й бачити результат своєї роботи у фізичних пристроях.

Поточний робочий діапазон: 100 МГц – 3.5 ГГц
У розробці: розширення до 6–8 ГГц

Наразі лабораторія забезпечується партнерами, але в перспективі - побудова власної (з вашою участю).



Обов'язкові вимоги

 - Вища технічна освіта (радіотехніка / телекомунікації / електроніка або суміжні)

 - Від 1 року комерційного досвіду (або сильний практичний досвід у проєктах / дослідженнях)

 - Досвід роботи з EM simulation tools (Ansys HFSS або CST Studio Suite)

 - Практичний досвід проектування:
   
   - patch-антен
   
   - PCB-вбудованих антен (Inverted-F, Meander тощо)

 - Розуміння фізики антен: bandwidth, gain, polarization, efficiency

 - Практичний досвід роботи з VNA (вимірювання S11 / VSWR)

 - Розуміння impedance matching та роботи зі Smith Chart

 - Досвід роботи в sub-6GHz діапазоні (або суміжних частотах)



Буде перевагою

 - Досвід у UAV / aerospace / IoT / embedded пристроях

 - Знання PCB-матеріалів (FR4, Rogers) та їх впливу на RF

 - Досвід роботи з MIMO та розрахунком ECC

 - Досвід вимірювань у безеховій камері (radiation patterns, TIS/TRP)

 - Розуміння впливу реального середовища на антену (detuning)

 - Досвід передачі дизайну у виробництво (DFM, тестування)

 - Робота з mmWave або високими частотами

 - Знайомство з phased arrays / beamforming



Що ми пропонуємо

 - Роль першого внутрішнього RF-спеціаліста з реальним впливом на продукт

 - Робота над живими hardware-рішеннями (UAV / IoT)

 - Гібридний формат (Київ)

 - Можливість бронювання



💡 Додатково:
Готові розглядати кандидатів з меншим досвідом, якщо є сильна практика або pet-проекти в RF / антенах.

source_jobs.title: HR Generalist & Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
Kyiv Office | IT Infrastructure | Recruitment & HR

Про компанію
Наш клієнт - провідний системний інтегратор України, який з 2008 року впроваджує масштабні рішення для IT-інфраструктури, хмарних сервісів та інформаційної безпеки для великого бізнесу та державного сектору. Компанія має статус критично важливого підприємства для економіки України.

Вони шукають HR Generalist & Recruiter - який візьме на себе затишний цикл підбору персоналу та підтримку команди в київському офісі.

   Офіційне бронювання: Компанія гарантує виконання всіх умов бронювання для військовозобов'язаних працівників (за наявності документів).

 - Жодного конвеєра та спаму: Навантаження комфортне - в середньому від 2 до 4 вакансій у роботі одночасно (фокус на якість, а не на кількість).

 - Стабільність та безпека: Робота в офісі з облаштованим сертифікованим укриттям, медичне страхування та оплачуване навчання.

Що ви будете робити:

 - Закриття вакансій у сферах IT-інфраструктури та продажів (у роботі: IT-інженери, архітектори рішень, менеджери з продажу складних IT-продуктів (B2B), адміністратори).

 - Повний цикл: від поняття профілю з лінійними керівниками до підготовки Job Offer.

 - Використання прямого пошуку (Headhunting/Executive Search) та робота з рекомендаціями в індустрії.

 - Участь у внутрішніх HR-проектах (оцінка, навчання, корпоративна культура).

Кого шукаємо:

 - 1+ рік успішного досвіду в рекрутингу (досвід закриття технічних IT/інфраструктурних або складних B2B Sales позиція буде перевагою).

Розташування та умови:

📍 Локація: Київ, комфортний офіс в 10 хвилинах пішки від метро (нове облаштування безпечного укриття).

🕒 Графік: Понеділок – Четвер: 9:00 – 18:00, П’ятниця - скорочений день до 17:00.

Пропозиції компанії:

source_jobs.title: Senior Compliance Officer / MLRO
source_jobs.description:
UK | Full-time (Hybrid/Remote - Office located in London) | UK Residence is a must

Overview

We are seeking a highly experienced MLRO & DPO to lead our regulatory compliance, financial crime risk management, and data protection functions for our FCA-regulated Electronic Money Institution (EMI).

The successful candidate will hold a triple-mandate responsibility: acting as the Money Laundering Reporting Officer (MLRO), and Data Protection Officer (DPO). You will be the primary guardian of our operational integrity, ensuring full adherence to FCA regulations, UK GDPR, and global AML/CTF standards.

Key Responsibilities

1. Regulatory Oversight & Liaison

 - Central Liaison: Serve as the primary point of contact for the FCA, NCA, ICO, and law enforcement agencies.

 - Regulatory Intelligence: Monitor and analyze new developments (FCA Handbook, PSRs/EMRs, Consumer Duty) and implement necessary changes to business activities.

 - Board Advisory: Provide strategic advice to the Executive Board and CEO on regulatory obligations, escalating material breaches or significant financial crime risks promptly.

 - Reporting: Prepare and submit quarterly Regulatory Assurance Reports, the Annual MLRO Report, and all required EMI-specific disclosures.

2. Risk Management & Governance

 - Framework Ownership: Design and maintain the Enterprise-Wide Risk Management (ERM) program, Risk Appetite Statement, and Risk Register.

 - Internal Controls: Proactively identify operational, safeguarding, and conduct risks. Conduct annual Risk & Control Self-Assessments (RCSA).

 - Product Compliance: Approve new products and initiatives using "Compliance by Design" principles, ensuring all marketing and client agreements meet FCA standards.

 - Reporting Metrics: Collect and analyze KRIs and KPIs, maintaining a comprehensive Incidents Log to evaluate non-compliance risks.

3. AML/CTF & Financial Crime Prevention (MLRO)

 - Program Management: Build and oversee the AML/CTF framework, including PEPs, Sanctions, and Transaction Monitoring policies.

 - SAR Management: Act as the nominated officer for receiving, assessing, and submitting Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) to the NCA.

 - High-Risk Oversight: Sign off on Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) and onboarding decisions for high-risk customers.

 - Monitoring & Calibration: Oversee Transaction Monitoring system thresholds, quality-assuring alerts and managing account suspensions.

4. Data Protection & Privacy (DPO)

 - GDPR Compliance: Monitor adherence to the UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018.

 - Privacy Tools: Maintain the Record of Processing Activities (ROPA), data mapping, and conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIAs).

 - Rights Management: Lead the response to Data Subject Access Requests (DSARs) and manage data breach handling/notifications to the ICO.

 - Third-Party Risk: Review cross-border data transfers (SCCs) and conduct compliance audits of third-party data processors.

5. Training, Audit & Culture

 - Educational Leadership: Deliver firm-wide training on AML, SAR processes, data privacy, and the firm’s compliance culture.

 - Monitoring Plan: Execute the Compliance Monitoring Plan, including internal audits and testing of control effectiveness across all departments.

Qualifications & Experience

 - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Law, Finance, or Business. Professional certifications (CAMS, ICA, or CIPP/E) are highly desirable.

 - Experience: Minimum 5-7 years of senior compliance experience within a UK FCA-regulated financial institution (EMI, PI, or Bank).

 - Regulatory Expertise: Deep technical knowledge of the Money Laundering Regulations 2017, FCA Specialist Sourcebooks, and UK GDPR.

 - Leadership: Proven track record of interacting with the FCA/NCA and reporting directly to a Board of Directors.

Key Competencies

 - Risk-Based Decision Making: Ability to make critical decisions in high-pressure, complex regulatory scenarios.

 - Tech-Savvy Approach: Profic

source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Python/Django + React/TypeScript | Europe | Remote


Brief of the Role

Our client is looking for a Senior Fullstack Engineer who owns their domain end-to-end - from API design to production UI - and operates with the autonomy and judgment that comes from real experience at scale.

This is not a role where you wait for specifications and implement them. You will own a zone of the codebase: its architecture, its quality, its technical debt, and its path forward. You make the calls within your zone. You write the tests. You ship to production and stay accountable for what happens after.

The company is in the middle of a deliberate engineering transformation - moving from AI-assisted development to AI-native operations. You will work with agentic tools daily, orchestrating AI to handle execution while you focus on architecture, judgment, and quality. The company expects every engineer to reach full agentic fluency: humans defining what correct means, agents executing against that definition, and engineers owning the outcome.



Their stack: Python, Django, and DRF on the backend; TypeScript and React on the frontend; Postgres and ClickHouse for data; AWS and Kubernetes for infrastructure. We run a modular monolith across five production Kubernetes clusters serving approximately 150 tenants at roughly 5,000 RPM. This is real-world scale with real-world complexity - not a greenfield prototype.



Your background

You are a senior engineer who has shipped production systems under real load and knows what it costs to maintain them. You don’t just write features - you own the systems they live in. You’ve made architectural decisions you had to live with, debugged production incidents under pressure, and learned firsthand why test coverage matters before code leaves your hands.

You operate with high autonomy. You take a problem, break it down, make decisions, and deliver - without needing someone to check on you. When something is ambiguous, you resolve it. When something breaks in production, you fix it and make sure it doesn’t break the same way again.

You are pragmatic about AI. You use agentic tools to move faster, but you review what they produce with the same rigor you’d apply to any junior engineer’s code. You understand that AI is leverage, not a replacement for judgment - and you invest in making agents better by improving the context they work with.

You communicate directly and efficiently. You write things down - in tickets, in documentation, in code - because you know that knowledge locked in one person’s head is a team liability, not a personal asset.



Qualities we seek

 - 5-7+ years of commercial full-stack development experience

 - Strong Python and Django/DRF skills with production Postgres experience under real load

 - Production-level React and TypeScript - not side projects, not tutorials

 - Proven ability to own a domain without micromanagement: architecture, code quality, test coverage, technical debt

 - Self-directed work style with direct collaboration with product managers - no intermediary layers

 - Experience with multi-tenant systems, high-volume data, or complex data pipelines

 - Russian as primary working language; English at professional working level

 - Active use of AI and agentic tools in your development workflow - or a demonstrated willingness and ability to adopt them rapidly

Nice to have

 - ClickHouse or other analytical databases

 - High-load systems, fintech, or similarly demanding environments

 - Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, CircleCI - enough to debug a broken pipeline, not just use one

 - Message queues and distributed systems: Kafka, RabbitMQ, idempotency patterns



What they expect of you

 - You do what you say you will do - a core company principle.

 - Own your zone of the codebase fully - architecture, quality, documentation, and operational health. Your zone should be legible to any senior engineer without you in the room.

 - Build features end-to-end: API through UI.

About Company

Limepack is a dynamic, fast-growing European e-commerce company specializing in custom-printed takeaway packaging. Growing at 30-50% annually, we double our size every 2-3 years. We connect European brands with top-tier manufacturers. We are now expanding our production partnership network in Turkey (primarily around Istanbul) and are looking for a senior, autonomous Partnership & Sourcing Manager to be our local representative and "boots on the ground."

Role Overview

Type of contract: Freelance / B2B Contract (Independent Contractor)

Location: Remote, based in Istanbul (with regular field/factory visits)

Time commitment: Part-time, flexible hours (Average: 10 hours/week, up to 20 hours based on availability)

Hourly Rate: $30 - $60 USD / hour (depending on experience)

Reporting to: Product Sourcer and CEO

Key Outcomes & Responsibilities

Your main mission is to identify, vet, and build long-term relationships with the single best packaging manufacturers in Turkey. This is not a short-term gig; it is an ongoing role that scales from initial sourcing to full relationship management.

Sourcing & Mapping: Conduct thorough online/offline research to map out smaller and mid-sized packaging and printing producers in the Istanbul area.

Boots on the Ground: Personally visit factories, conduct production compliance checks, audit workflows, and run pre-shipment quality control.

Bridge the EU-Turkey Gap: Ensure that manufacturers understand and meet strict European compliance laws regarding food packaging, materials, and quality standards (which are significantly stricter than local Turkish laws).

Negotiation & Pitching: Conduct light negotiations, pitch Limepack as a premium long-term partner, and secure strong commercial terms.

Onboarding Project: Your first paid task (10-30 hours) will be to source and onboard a local compliance testing house/legal partner in Turkey.

Requirements

Industry Background: Direct experience working with manufacturing, ideally in paper products, packaging, printing, or FMCG (food contact materials/cosmetics is a massive plus).

Language Skills: Native Turkish and excellent business-level English (you will communicate directly with the leadership in Denmark).

Mobility: Must have a valid driver’s license, a reliable personal vehicle, and a willingness to travel heavily around Istanbul’s industrial zones.

Business Setup: Ability to legally invoice Limepack as an independent contractor/freelancer (e.g., Sahis Sirketi).

Seniority: A highly professional communicator who can confidently represent Limepack in front of factory owners and directors.

source_jobs.title: M&A Opportunity Sourcer
source_jobs.description:
About Company

Limepack is a rapidly scaling European e-commerce company specializing in custom takeaway packaging, achieving 30-50% year-over-year growth. As we continue to dominate the market, we are expanding our growth strategy to include Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A). We are seeking a highly analytical and sharp M&A Opportunity Sourcer to help us systematically map out, evaluate, and target acquisition opportunities across Europe and the US.

Role Overview

Type of contract: Freelance / B2B Contract

Location: Remote (Flexible, but must be aligned with European/US business hours)

Time commitment: Part-time, flexible hours (0-20 hours/week, with a 10-hour weekly average)

Hourly Rate: $20 - $60 USD / hour (depending on experience)

Reporting to CEO

Why This Role is Unique

True Work-Life Balance: M&A work is notorious for intense deadlines and burnout. We don't operate that way. We value high-quality judgment over chaotic rushing.

First M&A Hire: You will lay the groundwork for our acquisition strategy, meaning massive potential for professional growth as our corporate development scales.

Direct Collaboration: You will act as a strategic partner directly to the CEO, avoiding corporate bureaucracy.

What You’ll Do

This role is about judgment, not just list-building. Anyone (and any AI) can generate a list of a thousand companies. Your value lies in filtering that noise down to the few genuine opportunities worth the CEO's time.

Initial Sourcing: Build the initial pool of EU and US manufacturers/printers using search, directories, marketplaces, LinkedIn, and AI automation tools (speed here is fine).

Deep Qualitative Vetting: Move past the surface. Read target companies' websites, social media footprint, production capabilities, and ownership history to judge if they are a credible partner or acquisition target.

Ruthless Filtering: Narrow the pool down to a high-conviction shortlist of 1–5 targets that actually fit. Quality of judgment matters far more than volume.

Deal Briefing: Write clear, concise reasoning for each shortlisted company: what fits, what the strategic angle is, and what the potential risks are.

Founder-to-Founder Outreach: Draft highly professional initial outreach messages for the CEO to review, and manage the reply pipeline.

Future Growth: Over time, you will generate broader opportunity maps and industry overviews to identify unique scaling opportunities.

Requirements

Experience: Mid-level (3+ years) in a role requiring rigorous qualification and prioritization of targets, such as M&A/Deal Origination, Venture Capital/Private Equity research, Buy-Side Research, or advanced Procurement/Strategic Sourcing.

Sharp Business Judgment: The ability to look at a small manufacturer and quickly sense: "this founder would want to talk to us" versus "this is a dead end."

Research Mastery: Advanced online-sourcing skills (LinkedIn, web intelligence, directories, registries).

Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using AI, data tooling, or no-code automation for the repetitive, fast parts of the job.

Flawless English: Exceptional written English, with the ability to write sharp, structured, and logical business summaries.

Autonomy: Highly organized and independent, capable of delivering top-tier results with minimal supervision.

Nice-to-Haves

A background in Finance, Strategy, Economics, or Business.

Experience in market mapping or working within companies executing roll-up/consolidation strategies.

Experience tracking pipelines via CRM/No-code databases.

Interview Process

Prescreening & vetting by Onhires.

A 30-minute interview with our CEO, Mads.

A real, paid 10-30 hour pilot project (evaluating your research and reasoning).

Ongoing freelance cooperation.

PART-TIME / FRACTIONAL → FULL-TIME POTENTIAL | 🇺🇸 REMOTE (US)

 
 


🏢 ABOUT THE ROLE

Our client, Veriskin, is an innovative medtech company developing a handheld device for early skin cancer screening, currently in FDA clinical trials.

They are looking for a well-connected Business Development professional to establish the company's partnership function from the ground up—well before commercialization.

This is not a traditional sales role. Instead, you'll focus on building strategic relationships, expanding market awareness, and laying the foundation for future commercialization, reimbursement, and long-term growth.

 
 


🎯 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS

 - Build awareness of Veriskin's technology across large integrated healthcare systems.

 - Identify and develop partnerships with leading medical device companies for co-development opportunities and joint health economic studies.

 - Establish early relationships with primary care networks and healthcare providers.


COMMERCIAL STRATEGY

 - Collaborate directly with the CEO to shape partnership and go-to-market strategy.

 - Help establish the foundation for future reimbursement initiatives.

 - Support the company's long-term strategy around strategic partnerships, alliances, and potential acquisition opportunities.

 
 




✅ REQUIREMENTS


EXPERIENCE

 - Proven track record of selling medical devices or point-of-care diagnostic products to primary care organizations or integrated healthcare systems.

 - Existing network within the healthcare or medtech ecosystem with the ability to open doors through established relationships—not cold outreach.

 - Experience in strategic partnerships, business development, or M&A preparation, ideally within medical device or diagnostics companies.

 - Understanding of the healthcare reimbursement landscape and/or experience supporting health economic studies is a strong advantage.

 - Familiarity with enterprise sales cycles and stakeholder structures within integrated healthcare systems, including procurement, clinical leadership, and executive decision-makers.


SKILLS & ATTRIBUTES

 - Strong negotiation and relationship-building skills with the ability to engage senior executives at large healthcare organizations.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

 - Self-starter who enjoys building functions, processes, and partnerships from scratch.

 - Comfortable operating in a fast-moving, early-stage environment with minimal structure..

 
 


⭐ WHY THIS OPPORTUNITY STANDS OUT

 - Ground-floor opportunity — become Veriskin's first Business Development hire and build the partnership function from day one.

 - Mission-driven product — help bring innovative technology to market that enables earlier detection of potentially cancerous skin lesions.

 - Influence strategy before launch — join while the company is still in FDA clinical trials and shape its commercial future.

 - Direct access to leadership — work closely with the CEO on business development and strategic partnerships.

 - Long-term upside — compensation includes equity incentive options.

 - Flexible engagement — begin on a part-time/fractional basis with the opportunity to transition into a full-time leadership role.

 - Strategic vision — help position the company for partnerships with major medical device organizations and support its long-term growth through strategic alliances or acquisition.

source_jobs.title: Founding Technical Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
📍 Palo Alto, CA | On-site
$150K–$200K + equity + full benefits



Our client is an early-stage robotics company based in Palo Alto, building advanced hardware for mission-critical environments. The company is currently operating in stealth mode, with more details shared during the introductory call.

You'll be the first recruiter in the company, working side by side with the CEO to build one of the strongest engineering teams in robotics.

This is a deeply hands-on recruiting role.

You'll personally find, engage, and close exceptional engineers while helping build the recruiting function as the company grows.



The Role

You'll own technical recruiting from end to end.

Every critical engineering hire starts with you.

You'll spend more time working alongside the CEO than anyone else in the company, helping shape every key hiring decision.

Your focus will be to:

 - Build an outbound and referral engine from scratch

 - Find exceptional engineers who aren't actively looking

 - Turn cold outreach into lasting relationships

 - Create a recruiting experience that top talent talks about

 - Help build the recruiting function as the company scales



Who We're Looking For

We're looking for a fascinating human first and an exceptional technical recruiter second.

One thing the founder cares deeply about is an unconventional life story that has nothing to do with recruiting.

Think military veterans, expedition guides, wildland firefighters, elite hospitality, conflict-zone NGOs, mountain or dive guides, endurance athletes, founders, or people who've intentionally chosen the harder path and grown because of it.

Your path doesn't have to look the same. We're looking for curiosity, resilience, resourcefulness, and an obsession with solving difficult problems.

On the recruiting side, you've recently been hands-on at an early-stage startup or boutique search firm, personally owning difficult engineering searches. You genuinely enjoy sourcing, outbound recruiting, and closing exceptional candidates more than managing recruiters. You thrive in ambiguity and love building things that don't exist yet.



Pace

This is an early-stage startup, and the pace is intense.

Sometimes that means getting on a plane tomorrow because that's where the best engineer is.



Location

On-site in Palo Alto.

Relocation support available.

Travel expected.



Why This Role

 - Be the first recruiter in the company

 - Partner directly with the CEO every day

 - Own every critical engineering hire

 - Build the recruiting function as the company grows

 - Help shape the future of the company from day one



No pipeline. No process. No recruiting team.

You'll be the first recruiter here. Every engineer who joins during these early years will be someone you found, convinced, and helped bring on board.

notes: High-growth company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, likely in the series A stage. Remote-friendly with a moderate hiring volume.
